# Pull Request

Thanks for contributing to `julilaoshi-design`.

## What changed?

Describe the change briefly.

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation fix
- [ ] README or onboarding improvement
- [ ] Pencil MCP Mode clarification
- [ ] Web Editor Mode improvement
- [ ] Right-side editor panel improvement
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Public-safe example
- [ ] Other

## Why is this needed?

Explain the problem or use case.

## Mode impact

Does this affect:

- [ ] Pencil MCP Mode
- [ ] Web Editor Mode
- [ ] Both
- [ ] Neither / documentation only

## User impact

Please explain whether this affects existing users.

## Public-safety check

Please confirm:

- [ ] No private local paths are included.
- [ ] No private chat logs are included.
- [ ] No client, student, or user materials are included.
- [ ] No unauthorized copyrighted assets are included.
- [ ] No private prompt chains or internal workflow details are included.
- [ ] No copied surface designs are included.

## Notes for maintainer

Add anything the maintainer should review carefully.
